notes: Replaced both window.confirm() calls with controlled Radix Dialog components. Added completeDialogOpen and cancelDialogOpen useState booleans. Complete dialog uses brand variant button (teal, primary action). Cancel dialog uses destructive variant button (red). Both dialogs explain consequences. Extracted confirmComplete() and confirmCancel() handlers for the actual API calls. Wrapped return JSX in React Fragment to host two dialogs alongside main content div. Zero window.confirm() calls remain.
